_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Build and maintain self-service reports and dashboards that enable business stakeholders to monitor KPIs and explore data without analyst intervention.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-004 (AB, cosine: 0.444), DQ-T-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.439).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.462). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [collect, metrics, trending] vs WIDAI-only terms [analyst, build, business, dashboards, enable, explore] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.894 (P=0.921, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.053 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Collect metrics and trending data." and "Build and maintain self-service reports and dashboards that enable business stak" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.478 ≈ STS 0.462 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [collect, metrics, trending]. WIDAI-only: [analyst, build, business, dashboards, enable, explore].
